TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Taypak 101 miawas tu mihcaan miuing tu siwacahay a panpawa == Taypak 101 miawas tu mihcaan siwacahay a panpawa amiuing , "Taipei 101 NewYear Firework", u Taywan Taypak-se a Taypak 101 matatundyhan a luma' namaka 2003 mihcaan, patucek han tu mihcaan tu 12 bulad 31 demiad " miawas tu mihcaan" katukuh tu cila a mihcaan tu 1 bulad 1 demiad " sayaway nu mihcaan" pisulitan nu tukian a patahekal tu silamalay nu panpawa, u piawasan nu Taypak a labui nu nipiuingan nu Taypak salimulakay nu baluhay a mihcaan. :Taipei 101 NewYear Firework) HighśĖįŚĻīŚüéšĻčŚ£ďŤĽł. picidekan u sayaway nu kitakid a nipatideng i matatunduhay nu luma'an a patahekal tu silamalay nu panpawaan. nipikilukan sayaway aitida i matatunduhay a luma'an apakasilamalay tu panpawaan, satalakaway a nipadeng makaala tu 509.2 kunce "1,671 ince", itida i madicemay nu nikatatungduhan, u satalakaway nu kitakid a nipalamalan tu panpawaan, itida i 2015 mihcaan katukuh tu 2016 mihcaan a miuing sa u nipalamalan tu panpawa makaalatu 30,000 a lalacuan, sakaytini i kitakid nu matatungduhay nu laumaan u satalakaway nu kilukan. nikalingatuan, tu mihmihcaan makaala tu lasubu nu wang ku tademaw mutaydaay a miadih, malakitakid atu Taywan sakatinengan nu tataydaan tu miawas nu mihcaan a kawawan. . nipaadih a kawaw Ť°®śľĒśĶĀÁ®č tu mihmihcaan a nipaadih a kawaw, namakayda namin tu tuki nu Taypak " CTC+8" 12 bulad 31 demiad tu labii malingatu, Taypak 101 a matatunduhay a luma' nu hekal a cabeng, kanca makayda ku nikatahekalan a paadih, katukuh tu miawas tu mihcaan a misausi tu tuki sa hamawsa a mapaneng, micumud tu sadikuday a sulitan nu tuki, tu mihmihcaan caay namin kalecad i waluay a nikatatungduhan nu luma ku cacay a sasulitan sipakay hekal namaka sasa tapabawsa, misamelimelitan mapaneng itidatu a sakalimulakan, palecad makayda i nikudan ku nipiasipan tu cacay a bataan, katukuh tu sadikuday nu Taypak a tuki tu cacay bulad cacay demiad sep benis sep selic milawit tu baluhay a mihcaan tatengan a malingatu, tawya nikatatungduhan nu hekalan paadih tu silamalay , misatanayu' tu tukian. (UTC+8)12śúą31 . mangaleb i Taypek sayaway u kunfan ku mikawaway a " miawas tu mihcaan a paimung" sa, palekal tu pilawitan nu mihcaan a paimung. namaka tawya nu kitakidan a saayaway ni patideng tu talakaway nu matatungduhay a luma'an ‚Äď Taypak 101, mala miawasay tu mihcaan a tataydaan. yu miasip tu namaka nikudan a miasip sa. mahedek tu a namaka nikudan miasip satu, papangpawa tu siwacahay i hekal nu matatungduhay a lumaan " saan tu picapian a mahedek tu 2003 katukuh i 2004 mihcaan tu sipakayda i nikudan miasip tu sapiawas tu mihcaan, itida a cacay i Taypak 101 liklik a papanpawan tu silamalay. nika itini i 2003 mihcaan tu nu ayawan, Taypei-se u se-cen-hu nu ayawan a putahan ku sakasikawaw tu piawasan nu mihcaan a angangangan nu kitidaan. . tu mihmihcaan a kawaw ś≠∑ŚĻīśīĽŚčē 2003 mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad ~ 2004 mihcaan 1 bulad 1 demiad 2003ŚĻī12śúą31 2020ŚĻī1śúą1śó• Taypak salimulakay nu baluhay mihcaan‚ÄĒ2020 pilakuuytan nu limulakay a labii u " satabakiay kaku a TAIPEI X TAIPEI", u " lamel" ku sakay balucu', patahekal tu Taypak a nikayadahan tu malamelay nu picidekan, mikakatu naayaway tu mudadiway a aadihan, milakuuyt tu sakakaput atu caayay kalecad nu nidatengan crossover saan tu nikalamelan tu angangangan nu lalangawan. ŤáļŚĆóśúÄHighśĖįŚĻīŚüé‚Äď2020 TAIPEI X TAIPEI",šĽ•"ś∑∑" crossover . ina yen-huo-siw u Taywan musaungayay a kusi " Taywan pa" ku sikawaway, ngangan u " kangalayan a likant‚ÄĒTaywan", mihida Taywan sibalungaay a laheci sa, saan ku imi mangalay ina Taywan idaw ku laheci nu balungaan, yadah ku nitupin tu tuudan nu lalangawan atu nikasilaculan a tuudan, masacacay namin ku balucu' nu tademaw. tanayu' nu panpawaan nu silamalay makaala tu 300 sasulitan, malecad atu nacilaan a mihcaan, u nipatahekalan tu sipanpawaay a lamalay makaala tu 1 wan 6 malebut nu pinaan. tawyaay a nipisikian milawitu cacayay a husuan mitiyang, patahekal tu nipsumadan nu luluay a kulitan, nu cacayay a husuan tusa ku wayway atu tuluay nu kulitan, atu sakalecad nu T-Pad mutiyungay a kulitan u " Taywa pa" masakaputay ku mikawaway. T-Pad . 2020 mihcaan 12 bulad ~2021 mihcaan 1 bulad 1demiad 2020ŚĻī12śúą31śó•ÔĹě2021ŚĻī1śúą1śó• si COVID-19 libung a kanki, mitiyangen ku taydaay nu tademaw micumuday miadih, nu taydaay a tadeamw asilaad, caay kan tu tuud', sisatabu tu laway, miditek tu udip, panganganan kiya taneng milabu. tawyaay mudadiway cu Lin-cing sumaden nida ku dadadiwan u masakaputay nu heni ku mudadiway a talaayaw sananay a dadadiwan. ÁĒĪśĖľCOVID-19 . 2022 mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad~ 2023 mihcaan 1 bulad 1 demiad 2022ŚĻī12śúą31śó•ÔĹě2023ŚĻī1śúą1śó• 2022 mihcaan 12 bulad 15 demiad, Taypak 101 sinbung kisa masasakamu patahekal tu aydaay nu panpawaay nu silamalay a sasakamuen , " midiput tu kitakid melimelitan ku nidatengan" atu 30 sasulitan nu mitanengay nu mitiyungay, sakamusa ku mikawaway saan: saayaway itini i naluma'an a 360 tu a paimung tu panpawaay nu silamalay, pasu T-PAD, lei-se amelikay, tinnaw dinki, itini sakay panpawan nu silamalay han idaw ku tahekalay nu " maudipay a kilan", " matawaay nu "bihid", " lihadayay a banul" nu panpawaay nu silamalay a kulitan, mamidiput tu kitakiday nu tademawan, mibangbang tu balucu nu tademaw, pa'ken tu balucu'. 2022ŚĻī12śúą15śó•,ŚŹįŚĆó101 ,ŚĆÖŚźęT-PAD, . 2003 mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad ~2004 mihcaan 1 bulad 1 demiad 2003ŚĻī12śúą31śó•ÔĹě2004ŚĻī1śúą1śó• nina piawasan tu baluhay nu mihcaan atu Taypak se-cen-hu mikawaway a miawas tu baluhay nu mihcaan a labiiay paimung masasuini, nika tawya nu Taypak 101 caay henay kahedek ku kitidaan, sisa ina matatungduhay a lumaan inai' ku panpawaay nu paimungay, sipakayda i sepatay nu kalimucu' a dingki namakayda i tungduh nu makasasa a 27 tungduhan nu luma' sipakay sasa hamaw sa tapabaw ku likat hida satu a misausi tu sipakayda i nikuda miasip, katukuh tu nai' ku aasipen sa malikat namin ku cabeng nu hekal, masadicemay nu likat a dinkian mahida u kamakamaan ku kulitan, udip nu dinkin kalalawlawan salengacay a kulitan, saan tu nipisausi tu tademawan hakiya makaala tu 16 wan a tademaw ku milabuay. tu mihmihcaan paadih tu silamalay nu panpawa kanca idaw ku cacay a bataan nu wan a tademaw tayda i Taypak 101 miadih tu silamalay nu panpawa, sakacaay kacacelcel, balihenaw, hatidaay nu tilibian a tademaw atu wanglu saan musakamu tu caayay kalecad nu aadihan sakacaay kacacelcel sa, duma satu Taywan kasienawan hina hetik ku wal amis puu' nu balian, matalaw tada siwacah tu, hatidaay nu tademawan mikilimaca tu Taypak 101 wali amisan, mahida u Taypak se-cen-hu kitidaan kapah adihan ku sipanpawaay silamalay nu kitidaan, namahida, taneng tayda i micapiay a buyu'an, mahida u Sin-buyu' talakaw ku kitidaan atu kapah aadihan a lalabinan nu liwkangan. .
S.PHON: == tajpak *** miawas tu mińß ¶aan miuiŇč tu siwa ¶ańßaj a panpawa == tajpak *** miawas tu mińß ¶aan siwa ¶ańßaj a panpawa amiuiŇč , "taip…ôi *** n…ôwj…ôar fir…ôwork", u tajwan tajpak-s…ô a tajpak *** matatundjńßan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° namaka **** mińß ¶aan, patu ¶…ôk ńßan tu mińß ¶aan tu ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad " miawas tu mińß ¶aan" katukuńß tu ¶ir~…ĺa a mińß ¶aan tu * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad " sajawaj nu mińß ¶aan" pisur~…ĺitan nu tukian a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu panpawa, u piawasan nu tajpak a r~…ĺabui nu nipiuiŇčan nu tajpak sar~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan. :taip…ôi *** n…ôwj…ôar fir…ôwork) ńßigńß******. pi ¶id…ôkan u sajawaj nu kitakid a nipatid…ôŇč i matatunduńßaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu panpawaan. nipikir~…ĺukan sajawaj aitida i matatunduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an apakasir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tu panpawaan, satar~…ĺakawaj a nipad…ôŇč makaar~…ĺa tu ***.* kun ¶…ô "*,*** in ¶…ô", itida i madi ¶…ômaj nu nikatatuŇčduńßan, u satar~…ĺakawaj nu kitakid a nipar~…ĺamar~…ĺan tu panpawaan, itida i **** mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu **** mińß ¶aan a miuiŇč sa u nipar~…ĺamar~…ĺan tu panpawa makaar~…ĺatu **,*** a r~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶uan, sakajtini i kitakid nu matatuŇčduńßaj nu r~…ĺaumaan u satar~…ĺakawaj nu kir~…ĺukan. nikar~…ĺiŇčatuan, tu mińßmińß ¶aan makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺasubu nu waŇč ku tad…ômaw mutajdaaj a miadińß, mar~…ĺakitakid atu tajwan sakatin…ôŇčan nu tatajdaan tu miawas nu mińß ¶aan a kawawan. . nipaadińß a kawaw **** tu mińßmińß ¶aan a nipaadińß a kawaw, namakajda namin tu tuki nu tajpak " ¶t ¶+*" ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad tu r~…ĺabii mar~…ĺiŇčatu, tajpak *** a matatunduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ a ¶ab…ôŇč, kan ¶a makajda ku nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan a paadińß, katukuńß tu miawas tu mińß ¶aan a misausi tu tuki sa ńßamawsa a mapan…ôŇč, mi ¶umud tu sadikudaj a sur~…ĺitan nu tuki, tu mińßmińß ¶aan ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad i war~…ĺuaj a nikatatuŇčduńßan nu r~…ĺuma ku ¶a ¶aj a sasur~…ĺitan sipakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ namaka sasa tapabawsa, misam…ôr~…ĺim…ôr~…ĺitan mapan…ôŇč itidatu a sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad makajda i nikudan ku nipiasipan tu ¶a ¶aj a bataan, katukuńß tu sadikudaj nu tajpak a tuki tu ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj d…ômiad s…ôp b…ônis s…ôp s…ôr~…ĺi ¶ mir~…ĺawit tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a mińß ¶aan tat…ôŇčan a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, tawja nikatatuŇčduńßan nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺan paadińß tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj , misatanaju Ē~ ° tu tukian. (ut ¶+*)***** . maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb i tajp…ôk sajawaj u kunfan ku mikawawaj a " miawas tu mińß ¶aan a paimuŇč" sa, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu pir~…ĺawitan nu mińß ¶aan a paimuŇč. namaka tawja nu kitakidan a saajawaj ni patid…ôŇč tu tar~…ĺakawaj nu matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an * tajpak ***, mar~…ĺa miawasaj tu mińß ¶aan a tatajdaan. ju miasip tu namaka nikudan a miasip sa. mańß…ôd…ôk tu a namaka nikudan miasip satu, papaŇčpawa tu siwa ¶ańßaj i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan " saan tu pi ¶apian a mańß…ôd…ôk tu **** katukuńß i **** mińß ¶aan tu sipakajda i nikudan miasip tu sapiawas tu mińß ¶aan, ¶aan a aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu kitidaan. . tu mińßmińß ¶aan a kawaw **** **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad ~ **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad ********** ********* tajpak sar~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj nu bar~…ĺuńßaj mińß ¶aan***** pir~…ĺakuujtan nu r~…ĺimur~…ĺakaj a r~…ĺabii u " satabakiaj kaku a taip…ôi * taip…ôi", u " r~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺ" ku sakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu tajpak a nikajadańßan tu mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu pi ¶id…ôkan, mikakatu naajawaj tu mudadiwaj a aadińßan, mir~…ĺakuujt tu sakakaput atu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nidat…ôŇčan ¶rosso*…ôr saan tu nikar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺan tu aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. ***ńßigńß******** taip…ôi * taip…ôi",*"*" ¶rosso*…ôr . ina j…ôn-ńßuo-siw u tajwan musauŇčajaj a kusi " tajwan pa" ku sikawawaj, ŇčaŇčan u " kaŇčar~…ĺajan a r~…ĺikant*tajwan", mińßida tajwan sibar~…ĺuŇčaaj a r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i sa, saan ku imi maŇčar~…ĺaj ina tajwan idaw ku r~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu bar~…ĺuŇčaan, jadańß ku nitupin tu tuudan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan a tuudan, masa ¶a ¶aj namin ku bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw. tanaju Ē~ ° nu panpawaan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj makaar~…ĺa tu *** sasur~…ĺitan, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad atu na ¶ir~…ĺaan a mińß ¶aan, u nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺan tu sipanpawaaj a r~…ĺamar~…ĺaj makaar~…ĺa tu * wan * mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu pinaan. tawjaaj a nipisikian mir~…ĺawitu ¶a ¶ajaj a ńßusuan mitijaŇč, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nipsumadan nu r~…ĺur~…ĺuaj a kur~…ĺitan, nu ¶a ¶ajaj a ńßusuan tusa ku wajwaj atu tur~…ĺuaj nu kur~…ĺitan, atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu t-pad mutijuŇčaj a kur~…ĺitan u " tajwa pa" masakaputaj ku mikawawaj. t-pad . **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ~**** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad *d…ômiad ********************* si ¶o*id-** r~…ĺibuŇč a kanki, mitijaŇč…ôn ku tajdaaj nu tad…ômaw mi ¶umudaj miadińß, nu tajdaaj a tad…ôamw asir~…ĺaad, ¶aaj kan tu tuud Ē~ °, sisatabu tu r~…ĺawaj, midit…ôk tu udip, paŇčaŇčanan kija tan…ôŇč mir~…ĺabu. tawjaaj mudadiwaj ¶u r~…ĺin- ¶iŇč sumad…ôn nida ku dadadiwan u masakaputaj nu ńß…ôni ku mudadiwaj a tar~…ĺaajaw sananaj a dadadiwan. ** ¶o*id-** . **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad~ **** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad ********************* **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, tajpak *** sinbuŇč kisa masasakamu patańß…ôkar~…ĺ saajawaj itini i nar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an a *** tu a paimuŇč tu panpawaaj nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, pasu t-pad, r~…ĺ…ôi-s…ô am…ôr~…ĺikaj, tinnaw dinki, itini sakaj panpawan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ńßan idaw ku tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu " maudipaj a kir~…ĺan", " matawaaj nu "bińßid", " r~…ĺińßadajaj a banur~…ĺ" nu panpawaaj nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a kur~…ĺitan, mamidiput tu kitakidaj nu tad…ômawan, mibaŇčbaŇč tu bar~…ĺu ¶u nu tad…ômaw, pa Ē~ °k…ôn tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. ***********,***** ,**t-pad, . **** mińß ¶aan ** bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad ~**** mińß ¶aan * bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad ********************* nina piawasan tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan atu tajpak s…ô- ¶…ôn-ńßu mikawawaj a miawas tu bar~…ĺuńßaj nu mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺabiiaj paimuŇč masasuini, nika tawja nu tajpak *** ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kańß…ôd…ôk ku kitidaan, sisa ina matatuŇčduńßaj a r~…ĺumaan inai Ē~ ° ku panpawaaj nu paimuŇčaj, sipakajda i s…ôpataj nu kar~…ĺimu ¶u Ē~ ° a diŇčki namakajda i tuŇčduńß nu makasasa a ** tuŇčduńßan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sipakaj sasa ńßamaw sa tapabaw ku r~…ĺikat ńßida satu a misausi tu sipakajda i nikuda miasip, katukuńß tu nai Ē~ ° ku aasip…ôn sa mar~…ĺikat namin ku ¶ab…ôŇč nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, masadi ¶…ômaj nu r~…ĺikat a dinkian mańßida u kamakamaan ku kur~…ĺitan, udip nu dinkin kar~…ĺar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a kur~…ĺitan, saan tu nipisausi tu tad…ômawan ńßakija makaar~…ĺa tu ** wan a tad…ômaw ku mir~…ĺabuaj. tu mińßmińß ¶aan paadińß tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu panpawa kan ¶a idaw ku ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu wan a tad…ômaw tajda i tajpak *** miadińß tu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu panpawa, saka ¶aaj ka ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ, bar~…ĺińß…ônaw, ńßatidaaj nu tir~…ĺibian a tad…ômaw atu waŇčr~…ĺu saan musakamu tu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu aadińßan saka ¶aaj ka ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ sa, duma satu tajwan kasi…ônawan ńßina ńß…ôtik ku war~…ĺ amis puu Ē~ ° nu bar~…ĺian, matar~…ĺaw tada siwa ¶ańß tu, ńßatidaaj nu tad…ômawan mikir~…ĺima ¶a tu tajpak *** war~…ĺi amisan, mańßida u tajpak s…ô- ¶…ôn-ńßu kitidaan kapańß adińßan ku sipanpawaaj sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu kitidaan, namańßida, tan…ôŇč tajda i mi ¶apiaj a buju Ē~ °an, mańßida u sin-buju Ē~ ° tar~…ĺakaw ku kitidaan atu kapańß aadińßan a r~…ĺar~…ĺabinan nu r~…ĺiwkaŇčan. .
S.FORM: == Taypak 101 miawas tu mihcaan miuing tu siwacahay a panpawa == Taypak 101 miawas tu mihcaan siwacahay a panpawa amiuing , "Taipei 101 NewYear Firework", u Taywan Taypak-se a Taypak 101 matatundyhan a luma' namaka 2003 mihcaan, patucek han tu mihcaan tu 12 bulad 31 demiad " miawas tu mihcaan" katukuh tu cila a mihcaan tu 1 bulad 1 demiad " sayaway nu mihcaan" pisulitan nu tukian a patahekal tu silamalay nu panpawa, u piawasan nu Taypak a labui nu nipiuingan nu Taypak salimulakay nu baluhay a mihcaan. :Taipei 101 NewYear Firework) HighśĖįŚĻīŚüéšĻčŚ£ďŤĽł. picidekan u sayaway nu kitakid a nipatideng i matatunduhay nu luma'an a patahekal tu silamalay nu panpawaan. nipikilukan sayaway aitida i matatunduhay a luma'an apakasilamalay tu panpawaan, satalakaway a nipadeng makaala tu 509.2 kunce "1,671 ince", itida i madicemay nu nikatatungduhan, u satalakaway nu kitakid a nipalamalan tu panpawaan, itida i 2015 mihcaan katukuh tu 2016 mihcaan a miuing sa u nipalamalan tu panpawa makaalatu 30,000 a lalacuan, sakaytini i kitakid nu matatungduhay nu laumaan u satalakaway nu kilukan. nikalingatuan, tu mihmihcaan makaala tu lasubu nu wang ku tademaw mutaydaay a miadih, malakitakid atu Taywan sakatinengan nu tataydaan tu miawas nu mihcaan a kawawan. . nipaadih a kawaw Ť°®śľĒśĶĀÁ®č tu mihmihcaan a nipaadih a kawaw, namakayda namin tu tuki nu Taypak " CTC+8" 12 bulad 31 demiad tu labii malingatu, Taypak 101 a matatunduhay a luma' nu hekal a cabeng, kanca makayda ku nikatahekalan a paadih, katukuh tu miawas tu mihcaan a misausi tu tuki sa hamawsa a mapaneng, micumud tu sadikuday a sulitan nu tuki, tu mihmihcaan caay namin kalecad i waluay a nikatatungduhan nu luma ku cacay a sasulitan sipakay hekal namaka sasa tapabawsa, misamelimelitan mapaneng itidatu a sakalimulakan, palecad makayda i nikudan ku nipiasipan tu cacay a bataan, katukuh tu sadikuday nu Taypak a tuki tu cacay bulad cacay demiad sep benis sep selic milawit tu baluhay a mihcaan tatengan a malingatu, tawya nikatatungduhan nu hekalan paadih tu silamalay , misatanayu' tu tukian. (UTC+8)12śúą31 . mangaleb i Taypek sayaway u kunfan ku mikawaway a " miawas tu mihcaan a paimung" sa, palekal tu pilawitan nu mihcaan a paimung. namaka tawya nu kitakidan a saayaway ni patideng tu talakaway nu matatungduhay a luma'an ‚Äď Taypak 101, mala miawasay tu mihcaan a tataydaan. yu miasip tu namaka nikudan a miasip sa. mahedek tu a namaka nikudan miasip satu, papangpawa tu siwacahay i hekal nu matatungduhay a lumaan " saan tu picapian a mahedek tu 2003 katukuh i 2004 mihcaan tu sipakayda i nikudan miasip tu sapiawas tu mihcaan, itida a cacay i Taypak 101 liklik a papanpawan tu silamalay. nika itini i 2003 mihcaan tu nu ayawan, Taypei-se u se-cen-hu nu ayawan a putahan ku sakasikawaw tu piawasan nu mihcaan a angangangan nu kitidaan. . tu mihmihcaan a kawaw ś≠∑ŚĻīśīĽŚčē 2003 mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad ~ 2004 mihcaan 1 bulad 1 demiad 2003ŚĻī12śúą31 2020ŚĻī1śúą1śó• Taypak salimulakay nu baluhay mihcaan‚ÄĒ2020 pilakuuytan nu limulakay a labii u " satabakiay kaku a TAIPEI X TAIPEI", u " lamel" ku sakay balucu', patahekal tu Taypak a nikayadahan tu malamelay nu picidekan, mikakatu naayaway tu mudadiway a aadihan, milakuuyt tu sakakaput atu caayay kalecad nu nidatengan crossover saan tu nikalamelan tu angangangan nu lalangawan. ŤáļŚĆóśúÄHighśĖįŚĻīŚüé‚Äď2020 TAIPEI X TAIPEI",šĽ•"ś∑∑" crossover . ina yen-huo-siw u Taywan musaungayay a kusi " Taywan pa" ku sikawaway, ngangan u " kangalayan a likant‚ÄĒTaywan", mihida Taywan sibalungaay a laheci sa, saan ku imi mangalay ina Taywan idaw ku laheci nu balungaan, yadah ku nitupin tu tuudan nu lalangawan atu nikasilaculan a tuudan, masacacay namin ku balucu' nu tademaw. tanayu' nu panpawaan nu silamalay makaala tu 300 sasulitan, malecad atu nacilaan a mihcaan, u nipatahekalan tu sipanpawaay a lamalay makaala tu 1 wan 6 malebut nu pinaan. tawyaay a nipisikian milawitu cacayay a husuan mitiyang, patahekal tu nipsumadan nu luluay a kulitan, nu cacayay a husuan tusa ku wayway atu tuluay nu kulitan, atu sakalecad nu T-Pad mutiyungay a kulitan u " Taywa pa" masakaputay ku mikawaway. T-Pad . 2020 mihcaan 12 bulad ~2021 mihcaan 1 bulad 1demiad 2020ŚĻī12śúą31śó•ÔĹě2021ŚĻī1śúą1śó• si COVID-19 libung a kanki, mitiyangen ku taydaay nu tademaw micumuday miadih, nu taydaay a tadeamw asilaad, caay kan tu tuud', sisatabu tu laway, miditek tu udip, panganganan kiya taneng milabu. tawyaay mudadiway cu Lin-cing sumaden nida ku dadadiwan u masakaputay nu heni ku mudadiway a talaayaw sananay a dadadiwan. ÁĒĪśĖľCOVID-19 . 2022 mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad~ 2023 mihcaan 1 bulad 1 demiad 2022ŚĻī12śúą31śó•ÔĹě2023ŚĻī1śúą1śó• 2022 mihcaan 12 bulad 15 demiad, Taypak 101 sinbung kisa masasakamu patahekal tu aydaay nu panpawaay nu silamalay a sasakamuen , " midiput tu kitakid melimelitan ku nidatengan" atu 30 sasulitan nu mitanengay nu mitiyungay, sakamusa ku mikawaway saan: saayaway itini i naluma'an a 360 tu a paimung tu panpawaay nu silamalay, pasu T-PAD, lei-se amelikay, tinnaw dinki, itini sakay panpawan nu silamalay han idaw ku tahekalay nu " maudipay a kilan", " matawaay nu "bihid", " lihadayay a banul" nu panpawaay nu silamalay a kulitan, mamidiput tu kitakiday nu tademawan, mibangbang tu balucu nu tademaw, pa'ken tu balucu'. 2022ŚĻī12śúą15śó•,ŚŹįŚĆó101 ,ŚĆÖŚźęT-PAD, . 2003 mihcaan 12 bulad 31 demiad ~2004 mihcaan 1 bulad 1 demiad 2003ŚĻī12śúą31śó•ÔĹě2004ŚĻī1śúą1śó• nina piawasan tu baluhay nu mihcaan atu Taypak se-cen-hu mikawaway a miawas tu baluhay nu mihcaan a labiiay paimung masasuini, nika tawya nu Taypak 101 caay henay kahedek ku kitidaan, sisa ina matatungduhay a lumaan inai' ku panpawaay nu paimungay, sipakayda i sepatay nu kalimucu' a dingki namakayda i tungduh nu makasasa a 27 tungduhan nu luma' sipakay sasa hamaw sa tapabaw ku likat hida satu a misausi tu sipakayda i nikuda miasip, katukuh tu nai' ku aasipen sa malikat namin ku cabeng nu hekal, masadicemay nu likat a dinkian mahida u kamakamaan ku kulitan, udip nu dinkin kalalawlawan salengacay a kulitan, saan tu nipisausi tu tademawan hakiya makaala tu 16 wan a tademaw ku milabuay. tu mihmihcaan paadih tu silamalay nu panpawa kanca idaw ku cacay a bataan nu wan a tademaw tayda i Taypak 101 miadih tu silamalay nu panpawa, sakacaay kacacelcel, balihenaw, hatidaay nu tilibian a tademaw atu wanglu saan musakamu tu caayay kalecad nu aadihan sakacaay kacacelcel sa, duma satu Taywan kasienawan hina hetik ku wal amis puu' nu balian, matalaw tada siwacah tu, hatidaay nu tademawan mikilimaca tu Taypak 101 wali amisan, mahida u Taypak se-cen-hu kitidaan kapah adihan ku sipanpawaay silamalay nu kitidaan, namahida, taneng tayda i micapiay a buyu'an, mahida u Sin-buyu' talakaw ku kitidaan atu kapah aadihan a lalabinan nu liwkangan. .
